subcodes.first_line: Remember thou My handmaiden, from among My maidservants, who hath believed in My signs, turned unto Mine horizon, hearkened unto My call, and sought My Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امه من امائی التی آمنت بایاتی و اقبلت الی افقی و سمعت ندائی و قصدت مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action
